config.rationale: Experiment 2/30 — directly addresses the user's request to quantify MTP (NEXTN) speedup. Holds ALL other variables identical to the baseline (4eb71ad47b0b): SGLang, TP=1, max_model_len=65536, mem_fraction_static=0.85, dtype=auto, kv_cache_dtype=auto, fcfs, no prefix caching, no chunked prefill. The only delta is enabling --speculative-algorithm NEXTN with the user-provided draft hyperparameters (num-steps=3, eagle-topk=1, num-draft-tokens=4). This isolates MTP impact: any change in throughput / TPOT vs baseline (7156 tok/s, TPOT p95=10.19 ms) is purely the MTP effect. I deliberately kept max_model_len at 65536 instead of the user's 262144 because: (a) baseline used 65536 so the comparison stays apples-to-apples, and (b) NEXTN adds a draft-model KV cache + verification buffers, so jumping to 262144 with mem_fraction_static=0.85 risks OOM/runtime_crash (the known sglang failure pattern). If this run succeeds, a follow-up can push context to 131072/262144. Kept --disable-radix-cache to mirror baseline (radix off). Speculative draft model is intentionally NOT set — NEXTN uses the model's built-in MTP head (Qwen3.5 has_mtp=true), no external draft path needed.

llm_commentary: Experiment 7463cc35c921 failed outright — peak_throughput=0, TTFT p95=0, and all five smoke tests (basic_chat, tool_calling, tool_required, json_mode, json_schema) returned false with empty detail strings, indicating the SGLang server likely failed to start or the NEXTN speculative path crashed during initialization. Against all three goals (throughput, latency, balanced) this run contributes nothing since no metrics were captured. The most likely culprits are an incompatibility between NEXTN + the qwen3/qwen3_coder parsers, or the speculative-num-draft-tokens=4 vs num-steps=3 + eagle-topk=1 combination not being valid for the model's built-in MTP head.
docker_command: docker run --name bench-sglang-7463cc35c921 --gpus all --shm-size 16g --network host -v /root/.cache/huggingface:/root/.cache/huggingface -d -e SGLANG_ENABLE_SPEC_V2=1 lmsysorg/sglang:latest python3 -m sglang.launch_server --model-path Qwen/Qwen3.5-9B --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --tp-size 1 --dtype auto --enable-metrics --mem-fraction-static 0.9 --context-length 65536 --disable-radix-cache --mamba-scheduler-strategy no_buffer --speculative-eagle-topk 1 --speculative-algorithm NEXTN --speculative-num-steps 3 --reasoning-parser qwen3 --tool-call-parser qwen3_coder
